overview.description: Czech AI startup building custom AI assistants and automation solutions on LLMs, RAG, and RPA
overview.description_long: Revelia builds and operates AI assistants for enterprises, healthcare, and government on its Revelia IO Hub platform. The platform uses large language models (GPT-type), RAG, and RPA to orchestrate business processes, handle document workflows, and provide natural-language process control. Deployment options include private cloud, on-prem, and public cloud. A healthcare assistant is currently entering a clinical study.
overview.tagline: Umělá inteligence, užitečná dnes, nezbytná zítra. (AI, useful today, essential tomorrow.)

history.origin_story: Founded in July 2024 in Prague by a team of AI researchers and practitioners with PhD backgrounds, with the goal of delivering AI solutions with real-world impact in healthcare, government, and business.

key_milestones.event: First successful PoC and client projects in healthcare, government, and business
Healthcare AI assistant enters clinical study

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Revelia builds AI assistants primarily on top of third-party LLMs (GPT-type) with RAG and RPA orchestration. While the Revelia IO Hub platform adds a workflow layer, the core AI capability relies on commodity foundation models, making it susceptible to displacement as these models improve and incumbents (Microsoft Copilot, AWS AI services) offer similar orchestration natively.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Enterprise and healthcare AI automation is a real and growing market with genuine demand, but Revelia faces intense competition from large tech players and established AI vendors. The healthcare clinical study signals real traction, though the market entry is early.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Founded July 2024 with no known external funding. The company is at PoC/early-customer stage with a small team of ~5 visible employees and no disclosed investor backing or revenue information.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Very early-stage Prague startup (< 2 years old) with no known funding, thin AI moat built on top-of-LLM APIs, and a small team. While domain focus in healthcare and government provides some differentiation, the lack of funding and early-stage status make this a high-risk company from a job-seeker perspective.

metadata.notes: Company registered as Revelia s.r.o., IČO 21851247, founded 2024-07-24. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/reveliacz/. Jobs location includes Zlín (not Prague) — company may have distributed team.
